---
title: "pennyone-mcp.js"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\bin\pennyone-mcp.js"
loc: 18
complexity: 2
logic_score: 8.85
style_score: 3.99
intel_score: 3.62
overall_score: 3.84
---

## Intent
The `pennyone-mcp.js` sector implements modular logic focusing on __dirname, ROOT, bootstrap. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via __dirname, ROOT, bootstrap. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [execa](file://execa)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [join](file://node:path)
- [dirname](file://node:path)

### Exports
- `__dirname`
- `ROOT`
- `bootstrap`
